case_title: KAHN, PAMELA VS CITY & COUNTY OF SF:MUNI RAILWAY/BUREAU OF CLAIMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY KAHN, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF:MUNI RAILWAY/BUREAU OF CLAIMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAHN, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF:MUNI RAILWAY/BUREAU OF CLAIMS $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF:MUNI RAILWAY/BUREAU OF CLAIMS
